response.global_analysis:
1. Reference JSON Mismatch: The provided reference JSON only list the song 'Jouya Repaint' for all sections, but this video is actually a medley concert performance where different holoX members perform their solo songs. I discarded the reference lyrics for sections 2, 3, and 4 and performed manual transcription and translation for Takane Lui's 'WINK', Hakui Koyori's 'Calibration', and Kazama Iroha's spoken intro.
2. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are precisely anchored to vocal cord activations, utilizing aggressive truncation and instantaneous transitions to keep subtitles tightly synchronized with the highly rapid musical performance. No closed caption tags or background noise details are included.

subtitles.original: ...ラッパッパッパラ
どうしようもない この世界
(どうして欲しい？)
subtitles.english: (What do you want me to do?)

subtitles.original: black out
終末告げる鐘が鳴る
subtitles.english: The bell tolling the end is ringing.

パって踊ろうぜ trip しようぜ

subtitles.original: 陰キャも陽キャも sing a song
subtitles.english: Introverts and extroverts alike, sing a song!

subtitles.english: Pleasant things are all that matter.

sweet vengeance

subtitles.original: 実験だ！実験だ！実験 実験 実験だ！ 実験だ！実験だ！実験だ！
subtitles.english: It's an experiment! It's an experiment! Experiment, experiment, it's an experiment! It's an experiment! It's an experiment! It's an experiment!

subtitles.original: 一緒に！
いっくよー！
実験だ！実験だ！実験 実験 実験だ！ 実験だ！実験だ！実験だー！

subtitles.original: Thank you, thank you, thank you, Thank you, thank you, 処方中
subtitles.english: Thank you, thank you, thank you, thank you, thank you, currently prescribing.

subtitles.original: 弱った精神に劇薬パピプペポン！
subtitles.english: To a weakened spirit, a powerful medicine - pa-pi-pu-pe-pon!

subtitles.original: 健康！健康！健康！テンションアップテンションプリーズ！
subtitles.english: Healthy! Healthy! Healthy! Tension up, tension please!

subtitles.original: ダメって言われたらやりたくなっちゃうよ！
subtitles.english: When told "no", it just makes me want to do it!

subtitles.original: 迷ったら ダメダメ 迷わずにたくさん Yes!
subtitles.english: If you hesitate, no, no! Without hesitation, a big "Yes"!

subtitles.original: 迷える子羊は迷わずこっちっち！
subtitles.english: Lost sheep, head this way without hesitation!

subtitles.original: こよりのデータで こよりはハッピー
subtitles.english: With Koyori's data, Koyori is happy!

subtitles.original: こよりについてこい！でしょ？でしょ？
1, 2, 3 サンプル収集完了 臨時被験者
subtitles.english: 1, 2, 3 sample collection complete, temporary test subjects!

subtitles.original: 特殊な体質に感謝感激！
subtitles.english: Deeply grateful for your unique constitution!

subtitles.original: うっちゃらの内緒内緒 サービスオープン！

あっちなとこも 計算通り！

subtitles.original: 実験だ！実験だ！実験 実験 実験だ！ 実験だ！実験だ！
subtitles.english: It's an experiment! It's an experiment! Experiment, experiment, it's an experiment! It's an experiment! It's an experiment!

subtitles.english: Come on, come on, you can make more noise, right?!
